sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.

feat.name: Two-Weapon Fusillade
feat.text: You attack with both your weapons in a furious barrage. Strike twice, once with each weapon.

traits.name: Flourish
traits.text: Actions with the flourish trait are special techniques that require too much exertion for you to perform frequently. You can use only one action with the flourish trait per round.

traits.name: Gunslinger
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the gunslinger class.

archetype.name: Bullet Dancer
archetype.note: This archetype offers Two-Weapon Fusillade at a different level than displayed here.

feat.requirement: You're wielding two weapons, each in a different hand. At least one of these weapons must be a loaded firearm or loaded crossbow.
